name: USS PC-1183 (PC-1183)
events: 21 Jun 1944 USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. F.W. Scanland, Jr., USN) arrived at Colon (Christobal), Panama Canal Zone. She was escorted in by USS PC-1183 (Lt.(jg) L. Rogow, USNR). (1)
6 Aug 1944 USS Escolar (T/Cdr. W.J. Millican, USN) arrived at Cristobal, Panama Canal Zone from Key West, Florida. She was escorted in by USS PC-1183 (Lt.(jg) L. Rogow, USNR).
